title: Access to books of state offices
doc_html:
§353.  Access to books of state offices

The commissioner of administration shall have full access to the books of the state treasurer and to all offices of the state for the inspection of all books, accounts, and papers which may concern the duties of his office.

Added by Acts 1976, No. 649, §1.
doc_text:
§353.  Access to books of state offices
The commissioner of administration shall have full access to the books of the state treasurer and to all offices of the state for the inspection of all books, accounts, and papers which may concern the duties of his office.
Added by Acts 1976, No. 649, §1.
